subject: docs(pdf): expand DOWNLOAD_PDF.md to dual-approach pattern
body:
Rewrote from window.print()-only to a dual-approach pattern covering
both text-based (window.print) and canvas/image-based (pdf-lib) PDF
export. Decision guide at top based on content type. Full pdf-lib
implementation sourced from canva-grid with documented tradeoffs.

Tags: documentation, patterns, pdf, download, pdf-lib
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pattern-alignment
Semver: patch
